arts.ttl: Inter Milan vs. Bayern Munich: Lineups, team news, injuries, how to watch and more!
arts.sum: For the first time in history, Bayern Munich and Inter Milan are clashing in the Champions League quarterfinal stage. Inter finished fourth in the Champions League group stage then defeated Feyenoord twice in the Round of 16.

arts.ttl: Thomas Müller gives cryptic answers about Bayern Munich’s Uli Hoeness’ statements
arts.sum: Per @iMiaSanMia, when asked about the statements, Müller wished to not provide a clear answer. When asked about Hoeness’ statements on Müller being unprepared and surprised by the club’s decision, he replied that he could neither confirm nor deny those statements.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern almost signed Schwabe over Urbig
arts.sum: Die Rekordmeister came close to making a move for the experienced 29-year-old shot-stopper over the young prodigy Urbig.
